{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Way-power
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Shells of [[Way-power]] were used to resist planet-crushing force around [[Makiel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
